notes: Maintainer hardware validates the runtime SMG control surface.
Cloud shadow-learning contributed five non-destructive controls and excluded destructive actions.
Maintainer local evidence covers an extended register map beyond the cloud user-facing surface.

knowledge_summary: Maintainer's Sandisolar SD-HYM-4862HWP resolves to runtime descriptor smg_6200 via local SMG identity anchors: register 171 device_type/model_code=0x1E00 (7680), register 184 protocol/layout=1, and register 643 rated_power=6200. The local SMG register set does not expose the commercial model name, so the Sandisolar mapping is hardware/source-backed rather than register-name-backed. Full telemetry, the original SMG control set, and five cloud shadow-learning controls (304, 322, 330, 338, 425) are validated on this hardware; destructive actions 460 and 461 remain excluded.
